title: Software Update - DFU - Putting app in background during update
scenario: Verify DFU continues successfully when app is backgrounded and foregrounded during and after the update process
steps: Put the app in the background during the update.
Put the app in the background again.
expected: 1) The DFU update continues successfully when the app is brought back to the foreground. 2) The DFU finishes successfully even while the app is in the background.
